title: rubus × lyprocarpus
intro: Rubus × lyi (also known as Rubus × lyprocarpus) is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the rose family, created by crossing the bramble Rubus idaeus with the Japanese bramble Rubus thunbergii. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits associated with Rubus × lyi include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Rubus × lyi is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal compounds.
